testcase.name: test_account_banned_opcode[GASPRICE]

error.message:
failed on setup with "solcx.exceptions.SolcError: An error occurred during execution > command: `/home/runner/.solcx/solc-v0.8.15 @account-abstraction=../../@account-abstraction --combined-json abi,bin --base-path /home/runner/work/bundler-test-executor/bundler-test-executor/bundler-spec-tests/tests/contracts/ --allow-paths ../../@account-abstraction -` > return code: `1` > stdout:
> stderr: Error: Identifier not found or not unique. --> <stdin>:33:29: | 33 | function validateUserOp(UserOperation calldata userOp, bytes32, uint256 missingAccountFunds) | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^"

testcase.error: tests/conftest.py:88: in rules_account_contract return deploy_and_deposit(w3, entrypoint_contract, "TestRulesAccount", False) tests/utils.py:50: in deploy_and_deposit contract = deploy_contract( tests/utils.py:34: in deploy_contract interface = compile_contract(contractname) tests/utils.py:20: in compile_contract compiled_sol = compile_source( .venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/solcx/main.py:112: in compile_source return _compile_combined_json( .venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/solcx/main.py:291: in _compile_combined_json stdoutdata, stderrdata, command, proc = wrapper.solc_wrapper( .venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/solcx/wrapper.py:158: in solc_wrapper raise SolcError( E solcx.exceptions.SolcError: An error occurred during execution E > command: `/home/runner/.solcx/solc-v0.8.15 @account-abstraction=../../@account-abstraction --combined-json abi,bin --base-path /home/runner/work/bundler-test-executor/bundler-test-executor/bundler-spec-tests/tests/contracts/ --allow-paths ../../@account-abstraction -` E > return code: `1` E > stdout: E E > stderr: E Error: Identifier not found or not unique. E --> <stdin>:33:29: E | E 33 | function validateUserOp(UserOperation calldata userOp, bytes32, uint256 missingAccountFunds) E | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^

testcase.name: test_paymaster_banned_opcode[GASPRICE]

error.message:
failed on setup with "solcx.exceptions.SolcError: An error occurred during execution > command: `/home/runner/.solcx/solc-v0.8.15 @account-abstraction=../../@account-abstraction --combined-json abi,bin --base-path /home/runner/work/bundler-test-executor/bundler-test-executor/bundler-spec-tests/tests/contracts/ --allow-paths ../../@account-abstraction -` > return code: `1` > stdout:
> stderr: Error: Identifier not found or not unique. --> SimpleWallet.sol:31:29: | 31 | function validateUserOp(UserOperation calldata userOp, bytes32, uint256 missingWalletFunds) | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^"
